caption: A woman with long dark hair, wearing a striped shirt and over-ear headphones, is captured in a video call. She is positioned in a room with light-colored walls and pale yellow curtains hanging to her left. In the initial sequence, she is speaking with her eyes closed and touches her face near her eye. As the sequence progresses, she opens her eyes and looks toward the camera, transitioning from a serious expression to a wide smile, showing her teeth. The background remains static, featuring a neutral wall and a shelf-like ledge behind her. Small white text reading "Nancy Ganya" is visible in the bottom left corner of each shot. Her movements are focused on her facial expressions and minimal hand gestures as she interacts with someone off-screen.
